rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if...then...else for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in the correct scope: component type for port references, implementation for subcomponent bindings
Use logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in contracts
For output dependency contracts, relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in contracts
anti_patterns: Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names (integer, boolean)
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names must be int, real, or bool
